## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] feat: New feature
- [ ] fix: Bug fix
- [ ] docs: Documentation only
- [ ] refactor: Code refactor
- [ ] chore: Maintenance
- [ ] ci: CI/CD changes

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested the change locally
- [ ] I updated documentation when needed
- [ ] I followed Conventional Commits in commit messages
- [ ] This PR is focused and scoped to one main objective

## Screenshots or Recordings

Add screenshots or GIFs when UI changes are included.

## Related Issue

Link the issue number if applicable.
